examples.en: We climbed the mountain all morning.
examples.zh: 我們整個早上都在爬山。

examples.en: The mountain is covered with snow.

img: tall rocky mountain peak with snow

examples.en: The river flows into the sea.
Kids are swimming in the river.

img: wide flowing river through green valley

examples.en: The forest is full of tall trees.
examples.zh: 這座森林滿是高大的樹木。

examples.en: We got lost in the dark forest.
examples.zh: 我們在黑暗的森林裡迷路了。

img: dense green forest with tall trees

examples.en: The lake is calm and clear today.
They went fishing by the lake.

img: calm blue lake surrounded by hills

examples.en: There is a small house on the hill.
We ran down the grassy hill.
examples.zh: 我們沿著青草山丘往下跑。

img: small green grassy hill under blue sky

examples.en: A bird is sitting in the tree.
We planted a tree in the yard.
examples.zh: 我們在院子裡種了一棵樹。

img: single large green tree in open field

examples.en: The kids are playing on the grass.
examples.zh: 孩子們正在草地上玩耍。

examples.en: The grass turns green in spring.

img: fresh green grass field close up

examples.en: She picked a yellow flower.
These flowers smell very sweet.

img: colorful blooming flowers in garden

examples.en: A green leaf fell on the ground.
The leaf is wet from the rain.

img: single green leaf with water drops

examples.en: We walked along the sea at sunset.
examples.zh: 我們在日落時沿著海邊散步。

examples.en: The sea is deep and blue.

img: wide blue sea meeting the horizon

examples.en: We built a sandcastle on the beach.
The beach is crowded in summer.

img: sandy beach with gentle ocean waves

examples.en: The sand feels warm under my feet.
Don't get sand in your shoes.

img: close up of golden beach sand

examples.en: A big rock blocked the path.
He sat on a flat rock to rest.
examples.zh: 他坐在一塊平坦的石頭上休息。

img: large gray rock on mountain trail

examples.en: The island is far from the coast.
We took a boat to the island.

img: small green island in blue ocean

examples.en: This plant needs more sunlight.
examples.zh: 這株植物需要更多陽光。

examples.en: I water my plants every day.

img: small green potted plant on windowsill

examples.en: A river runs through the valley.
The valley looks green in spring.
examples.zh: 山谷在春天看起來一片翠綠。

img: green valley between two mountains

examples.en: The desert is hot and dry.
Few plants grow in the desert.
examples.zh: 沙漠裡很少有植物生長。

img: vast sandy desert with dunes

examples.en: The waterfall makes a loud sound.
We took photos near the waterfall.

img: tall waterfall falling into pool

examples.en: They live near the east coast.
We drove along the coast.

img: rocky coastline with ocean waves

examples.en: The cave is dark and cold inside.
Bats live deep in the cave.

img: dark rocky cave entrance

examples.en: The house stands on a steep cliff.
examples.zh: 那間房子矗立在陡峭的懸崖上。

examples.en: Don't stand too close to the cliff.

img: steep ocean cliff with crashing waves

examples.en: Ducks are swimming in the pond.
The pond froze over in winter.

img: small pond with lily pads and ducks

examples.en: The tree's roots are very deep.
Roots help the plant get water.

img: tree roots spreading into brown soil

examples.en: A bird built a nest on the branch.
The branch broke in the storm.
examples.zh: 樹枝在暴風雨中折斷了。

img: tree branch with green leaves

examples.en: We put the seeds in the soil.
A small seed can grow into a tree.
examples.zh: 一顆小種子可以長成大樹。

img: hand holding small brown seeds

examples.en: This soil is good for growing rice.
examples.zh: 這種土壤很適合種稻米。

examples.en: The soil feels soft and wet.

img: rich dark brown soil in garden

examples.en: Big waves hit the rocks hard.
The kids jumped over the waves.
examples.zh: 孩子們跳過一道道海浪。

img: large ocean wave curling and breaking

examples.en: The boat reached the shore safely.
Shells lay all along the shore.

img: sandy shore where waves meet land

examples.en: The coral comes in many colors.
Many fish live around the coral.

img: colorful coral reef underwater

examples.en: The park protects local wildlife.
examples.zh: 這座公園保護當地的野生動物。

examples.en: We saw lots of wildlife on the trip.
examples.zh: 旅途中我們看到許多野生動物。

img: wild deer and birds in green forest

examples.en: We recycle paper and plastic at home.
examples.zh: 我們在家回收紙張和塑膠。

examples.en: Please recycle these bottles.
examples.zh: 請把這些瓶子拿去回收。

img: hands sorting bottles into recycling bin

examples.en: We should use less plastic.
This bag is made of plastic.

img: pile of used plastic bottles

examples.en: Please throw the trash in the bin.
The beach was full of trash.

img: overflowing trash bin with garbage

examples.en: Air pollution is bad for our health.
examples.zh: 空氣污染對我們的健康有害。

examples.en: Cars cause a lot of pollution.

img: factory smoke polluting gray sky

examples.en: Solar energy is clean and free.
We must save energy at home.
examples.zh: 我們必須在家節約能源。

img: solar panels and wind turbines in field

examples.en: We should protect the ocean.
Trees protect the soil from rain.
examples.zh: 樹木保護土壤免受雨水沖刷。

img: hands holding green earth carefully

examples.en: We must care for the environment.
Pollution harms the environment.

img: clean green nature landscape with river

examples.en: The town sits on a narrow peninsula.
examples.zh: 這座小鎮位於一個狹長的半島上。

examples.en: Water surrounds the peninsula on three sides.
examples.zh: 海水從三面環繞著這座半島。

img: narrow peninsula surrounded by blue sea

examples.en: The glacier moves very slowly.
Many glaciers are melting fast.

img: huge blue glacier in cold mountains

examples.en: Many birds rest in the wetland.
The wetland is home to rare frogs.
examples.zh: 這片濕地是稀有青蛙的家。

img: marshy wetland with reeds and birds

examples.en: A healthy ecosystem needs many species.
examples.zh: 健康的生態系統需要許多物種。

examples.en: Pollution can destroy an ecosystem.
examples.zh: 污染可能摧毀一個生態系統。

img: balanced forest ecosystem with animals and plants

examples.en: The forest is a habitat for many animals.
examples.zh: 森林是許多動物的棲息地。

examples.en: We must not destroy their habitat.
examples.zh: 我們絕不能破壞牠們的棲息地。

img: natural animal habitat in green jungle

examples.en: Thick vegetation covers the hillside.
examples.zh: 茂密的植被覆蓋著山坡。

examples.en: Little vegetation grows in the desert.
examples.zh: 沙漠裡很少有植被生長。

img: lush green vegetation on hillside

examples.en: Wind is a renewable source of power.
examples.zh: 風力是一種可再生的能源。

examples.en: We need more renewable energy.
examples.zh: 我們需要更多可再生能源。

img: wind turbines and solar panels for renewable energy

examples.en: We should choose sustainable products.
examples.zh: 我們應該選擇永續的產品。

examples.en: Sustainable farming protects the land.

img: green sustainable farm with solar panels

examples.en: We turn food waste into compost.
Compost helps plants grow better.
examples.zh: 堆肥幫助植物長得更好。

img: compost bin with food scraps and soil

examples.en: Too much trash goes to the landfill.
examples.zh: 太多垃圾被送進掩埋場。

examples.en: Recycling keeps waste out of landfills.
examples.zh: 回收讓廢棄物不進掩埋場。

img: large landfill site with piles of waste

examples.en: We should conserve water in summer.
examples.zh: 夏天我們應該節約用水。

examples.en: Parks help conserve wild animals.
examples.zh: 公園有助於保育野生動物。

img: person turning off tap to conserve water

examples.en: Rainforests have rich biodiversity.
examples.zh: 雨林擁有豐富的生物多樣性。

examples.en: Biodiversity keeps nature in balance.
examples.zh: 生物多樣性維持大自然的平衡。

img: diverse plants and animals in tropical rainforest
